title: ectasis velleriflora
intro: Ectasis velleriflora, also known as Chinese angelica or dong quai, is a perennial plant native to China and other parts of Asia, belonging to the Apiaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include its anticoagulant, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of ectasis velleriflora include its potential to regulate menstrual cycles, alleviate menstrual cramps and menopausal symptoms, and boost the immune system. Ectasis velleriflora is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and can also be found in herbal supplements and traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
